text: Industrial Output (IIP): Manufacturing sector. December 2024. Index: 152.3. Growth: 5.2% YoY. Driven by auto components, electronics, and chemicals. Manufacturing accounts for 77.6% of IIP weight.
Industrial Output (IIP): Mining sector. December 2024. Index: 131.8. Growth: 3.8% YoY. Coal production: 93 MT in month. Iron ore output steady. Mining weight in IIP: 14.4%.
Industrial Output (IIP): Electricity sector. December 2024. Index: 218.4. Growth: 6.1% YoY. Peak demand: 230 GW. Renewable share: 23%. Weight in IIP: 8%. Thermal capacity utilization: 72%.
Industrial Output: Capital Goods. Q3 FY25 average index: 167.2. Growth: 11.5% YoY. Indicator of investment activity. Machinery, equipment manufacturing up. Government capex push driving demand.
Industrial Output: Consumer Durables. Q3 FY25 average index: 143.8. Growth: 7.3% YoY. Festival season demand. AC, refrigerator, white goods production up. PLI impact on electronics manufacturing.

Industrial Output: Infrastructure/Construction goods. Q3 FY25 average: 178.6. Growth: 9.1%. Cement, steel, glass production up. National Highway construction: 27 km/day target. PM GatiShakti driving demand.
